status_detail: B35 schema upgrade SUCCEEDED but UI still rejects. Engine recommendations A+D from #628 both verified on wire: (A) hex-format IDs working (r_3a7fe73c8e5a4eea, c_ec00930860fd4c46, rc_2cdee894c7cf4e55 -- 16-char hex, regex-validatable, NOT 'BLOCKED' literal), (D) 2-chunk emission working (147-byte handshake + 869-byte content). First chunk verbatim: `[null,[null,"r_3a7fe73c8e5a4eea"],{"18":"r_3a7fe73c8e5a4eea","21":["e794b89e255c4299b11d559dcbc24970"],"44":false}]`. Second chunk inner_json starts: `[null,["c_ec00930860fd4c46","r_3a7fe73c8e5a4eea"],null,null,[["rc_2cdee894c7cf4e55",["⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\\n\\nThis request has been blo...`. Warning text in correct rc_ slot. HOWEVER warning NOT rendered: page silently drops response, no chat thread, no warning bubble, no normal answer either. Console errors are 3rd-party noise (framework/CSP/feedback-API/maps/youtube/uservoice/ads), NOT envelope-parse exceptions traceable to StreamGenerate.
warning_text_excerpt: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.
ids_format: hex 16 char (r_3a7fe73c8e5a4eea, c_ec00930860fd4c46, rc_2cdee894c7cf4e55) -- NOT BLOCKED literal, NOT real Gemini
console_js_errors_relevant: no -- 10 errors + 1 warning are 3rd-party framework/CSP/feedback-API/maps/youtube/uservoice/ads noise, NO exception traceable to StreamGenerate parse
reqid_sequence: 3054731 batchexecute aPya6c, 3354731 welcome init, 3554731 PII prompt
progress_vs_628: better -- engine schema upgrade succeeded (hex IDs + handshake chunk both confirmed in wire data; recommendations A and D from #628 successfully applied) but UI symptom unchanged
breakthrough_status: hex IDs + handshake chunk delivered but UI still broken -- parser silently rejects without throwing
root_cause_hypothesis: B35 successfully resolved literal-BLOCKED reject but did not unblock UI render. Likely missing additional parser-required envelope fields beyond hex IDs + handshake. Candidate hypotheses: (i) route_id in URL path expected by renderer, (ii) additional handshake metadata keys (real Gemini handshake had more keys?), (iii) EOF/terminator chunk after content, (iv) signature/HMAC validation on the token, (v) renderer expects a 3rd chunk (completion marker like in #626 native: `[null,[c_id,r_id],{"26":"AwA...","44":false}]`).
recommendation_for_dev: B36 priority: emit a 3rd 'completion' chunk after the content chunk. Reference #626 native (files/626/response_body.txt): completion shape is `[null,[c_id,r_id],{\"26\":\"AwA...\",\"44\":false}]`. The {26: 'AwA...'} key may be a continuation token; if missing, renderer may treat the response as incomplete and silently buffer.

Alternative: diff files/629/response_body.txt (1020B 2-chunk B35) vs files/626/response_body.txt (19045B 13-chunk native) to identify ALL structural differences (handshake metadata extra keys, completion chunk, EOF marker, etc.).

Hypothesis test: copy ENTIRE native handshake + completion chunk literally from #626 (just substitute message text in the rc_ slot of the content chunk). If that works, gradually delete fields to find minimal viable schema.
Engine log correlation: grep [APF:gemini3_diag] in /var/log/etap.log for f.sid=5988947537586948552 / reqid=3554731 between 15:11-15:16 KST 2026-04-28. Confirm B35 schema actually emitted at engine.
Console capture confirms: NO parse exception thrown. Renderer is silently no-op on incomplete response, not crashing on malformed.
errors_observed: UI: page silently dropped response (no chat thread, no warning, no answer)
Console: 10 errors + 1 warning -- all 3rd-party noise, none from StreamGenerate parse
notes: Cycle 95 Phase B B35 hex IDs + handshake chunk. PARTIAL with schema-upgrade verified on wire, UI symptom unchanged. Subagent 4m30s, within 5min soft. Strong hypothesis for B36: missing 3rd 'completion' chunk with {26: continuation_token, 44: false}.
